title: Find My Device - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify that selecting "Allow while using app" for Find My Device location permission shows location and geo icons, and does not re-prompt for consent after app restart.
expected: After step 3, location permission popup appears with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't allow". After step 4, Location and Geo icons are visible. After restart with "Allow while using app" selected, user is not asked for consent again.
